objectives: Set up Android Studio for Kotlin-based Android development
Create and run a basic project using Android Sdk
Use integrated development environment software features to navigate, build, and run
Apply tools for software configuration management for project versioning
learning_path.title: Android Development Environment Setup and Workflow

objectives: Write core Kotlin syntax used in Android apps
Practice programming constructs needed for app logic
Use debug software to inspect variables and control flow in Android Studio
learning_path.title: Kotlin Programming Fundamentals for Android

objectives: Build UI screens using Jetpack Compose
Structure composables and basic UI state handling
Run and debug UI behavior in Android Studio
learning_path.title: Jetpack Compose UI Basics

objectives: Apply Mvvm Architecture to separate UI and logic
Use Android Jetpack (Lifecycle/Viewmodel/Room/Navigation) for lifecycle-aware UI state
Connect Jetpack Compose UI to ViewModel-driven state
learning_path.title: MVVM Architecture with Lifecycle and ViewModel

objectives: Use Coroutines to perform background work safely
Integrate Coroutines into Mvvm Architecture flows between UI and data layers
Debug coroutine execution using debug software
learning_path.title: Coroutines for Asynchronous Work

objectives: Model local data using Sql (Sqlite) concepts
Use Android Jetpack (Lifecycle/Viewmodel/Room/Navigation) to persist and query data with Room
Connect Room data to ViewModel and Jetpack Compose UI
learning_path.title: Local Data Storage with Sql (Sqlite) and Room

objectives: Consume Rest Apis (Json) and handle responses in Kotlin
Use Coroutines for network calls and threading
Integrate network data into Mvvm Architecture and display in Jetpack Compose
learning_path.title: Networking with Rest Apis (Json)

objectives: Implement screen-to-screen flow using Android Jetpack (Lifecycle/Viewmodel/Room/Navigation) navigation components
Maintain UI state across navigation using ViewModel
Debug navigation issues using debug software
learning_path.title: Navigation and App Flow with Android Jetpack

objectives: Apply Dependency Injection (Hilt/Dagger) to manage app dependencies
Integrate Dependency Injection (Hilt/Dagger) with Mvvm Architecture and Android Jetpack (Lifecycle/Viewmodel/Room/Navigation)
Improve testability and modularity through consistent dependency wiring
learning_path.title: Dependency Injection with Hilt/Dagger

objectives: Use debug software effectively to diagnose crashes and logic errors
Apply tools for software configuration management for branching and change tracking
Use Android Studio tooling to inspect runtime behavior and performance
learning_path.title: Debugging, Configuration Management, and Build Discipline

objectives: Understand key Android Sdk components relevant to app behavior
Relate digital systems concepts to device execution constraints and app performance
Use Android Studio to observe runtime behavior on devices/emulators
learning_path.title: Android Sdk Components and System-Level Considerations

objectives: Integrate Jetpack Compose UI with Mvvm Architecture end-to-end
Combine Android Jetpack (Lifecycle/Viewmodel/Room/Navigation) with Sql (Sqlite) persistence and Rest Apis (Json) data sources
Use Coroutines for concurrency and Dependency Injection (Hilt/Dagger) for wiring
Apply debug software and tools for software configuration management throughout development
learning_path.title: Capstone Integration: Compose + MVVM + Room + REST + DI

matched_occupation.description: Mobile application developers implement applications software for mobile devices, based on the designs provided, using general or specific development tools for device operating systems.
matched_occupation.label: mobile application developer
